```
# nvidia-settings: X configuration file generated by nvidia-settings
```

```
nvidia-settings -a CurrentMetaMode="DFP-0: 1680x1050+0+0, TV-0: 1024x768+1680+0 { ViewPortIn=1024x768, ViewPortOut=984x738+20+15 }"
```
